## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Hardening/reliability
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] Refactor

## Test Evidence

- [ ] Unit tests added or updated
- [ ] Integration tests added or updated
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test` or `npm run test:docker`
- [ ] `npm run smoke:test` (or explain why skipped)

Include command output snippets or CI links:

## Migration Impact

- [ ] No schema/data migration impact
- [ ] Migration included and reviewed
- [ ] Backward compatibility considered

Migration notes:

## Operational Impact

- [ ] No operational impact
- [ ] Runbook updates required
- [ ] Alert thresholds or dashboards updated

Operational notes:

## Rollback Safety

- [ ] Rollback path documented
- [ ] Rollback tested or simulated
- [ ] Fail-safe behavior verified for partial failure

Rollback notes:

## Checklist

- [ ] ROADMAP status updated (if applicable)
- [ ] README/docs updated (if applicable)
- [ ] No secrets or sensitive data committed
